testcase.name: testCreateGetDeleteRule

error.message: Error creating bean with name 'com.star.bank_products.controller.RuleApiTest': Unsatisfied dependency expressed through field 'mockMvc': No qualifying bean of type 'org.springframework.test.web.servlet.MockMvc' available: expected at least 1 bean which qualifies as autowire candidate. Dependency annotations: {@org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired(required=true)}
